name: codex-usage-widget
description: A macOS floating quota widget for Codex usage limits.

interface.shortDescription: Show Codex quota usage in a floating macOS widget.
interface.longDescription: Codex Usage Widget installs a local macOS HUD that follows the Codex desktop app lifecycle, stays optionally pinned, remembers its position, and displays 5-hour, weekly, and reset-credit quota information.
